title: Velvet Christmas Poinsettia Dark Green Pack of 6 Artificial Magnolia Flower Ornaments Picks Stems for Christmas Tree Decorations
features: Vletvet Christmas Poinsettia Flowers for Christmas Decorations are embellished with sparkling glittered petals and glittered Stamen in the center.
Large Christmas poinsettia ornaments are dramatic decorations for Christmas trees, party, wedding, banquet, etc.
Artificial Christmas Magnolia with stem. Easy to place them securely in between Christmas tree branches.
Easy to re-arrange these Christmas poinsettia petals as you want with an flexible iron wire on the reverse side.
Pack of 6. Flower size: 23cm in diameter. Stem length: 20cm
description: Christmas Poinsettia Flowers for Christmas Decorations are embellished with sparkling glittered petals and glittered Stamen in the center.
